creator: lordsith49@hotmail.com
text:
Sorry about the delay. I just re-tested on LibreOffice 3.5.7.2 with old and new password protected files created by OpenOffice.
I still get "The password is incorrect. The file cannot be opened."
Jonathan

> From: bapt@freebsd.org
> Date: Tue, 25 Sep 2012 19:40:17 +0200
> Subject: Re: ports/167775: editors/libreoffice cannot open password protected OpenOffice files.
> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org; lordsith49@hotmail.com
> 
> This should ne fixed by recent version, no?
> 
> regards,
> Bapt
 		 	   		  =
